title: Find My Device - Warning dialog for Play button
scenario: Verify the Play button warning dialog on the Find My Device screen matches Figma design when a connected headset is selected.
steps: Open the Find My Device screen.
Ensure a connected headset is selected.
Locate and tap the Play button.
Observe the warning dialog that appears.
Compare the warning dialog against the Figma design specifications.
expected: The warning dialog for the Play button matches the Figma design in terms of layout, text, colors, icons, and spacing.
